abrasion_wear.standard_ref: ISO 12947 Martindale / ASTM D4157 Wyzenbeek (ACT bands)
abrasion_wear.rationale: Cut-pile upholstery; class-typical ~15k double-rubs (residential/light-duty ACT band) unless a high-Martindale weave is specified.

dent_hardness.standard_ref: n/a (textile surface, not rated for Janka/indentation)
dent_hardness.rationale: Soft pile compresses but recovers; no rigid-surface dent metric applies.

cleanability.rationale: Pile traps soil; most velvets are S (solvent-clean) or W, not wipe-clean.

dust_static_affinity.rationale: Dense cut pile is a strong dust magnet and holds static; highest affinity class.

moisture_humidity_behavior.rationale: Pile holds humidity and is slow to dry; risk depends on backing fiber (synthetic vs natural).

indoor_air_voc.rationale: Inherently low-emitting fiber; backing adhesives/dyes can raise VOC unless GREENGUARD-certified.

abrasion_wear.standard_ref: ISO 12947 Martindale / ASTM D4157 Wyzenbeek (ACT bands)
abrasion_wear.rationale: Looped-yarn upholstery; loops snag/pill — class-typical light-duty abrasion band.

dent_hardness.rationale: Soft looped surface; no rigid indentation metric applies.

cleanability.rationale: Loops trap soil and resist wiping; typically S/W, not wipe-clean.

dust_static_affinity.rationale: Looped texture catches dust and lint; high affinity.

moisture_humidity_behavior.rationale: Loops hold moisture; drying slow, mould risk if backing is natural fiber.

indoor_air_voc.rationale: Low-emitting unless dyes/backing adhesives raise VOC; certify to confirm.

abrasion_wear.standard_ref: ISO 12947 Martindale / ASTM D4157 Wyzenbeek (ACT bands)
abrasion_wear.rationale: Tufted pile yarn; sturdier than velvet, many chenilles reach the ~30k double-rub commercial band.

dent_hardness.rationale: Soft pile, recovers; no rigid indentation metric.

cleanability.rationale: Pile holds soil; typically W/S, not wipe-clean.

dust_static_affinity.rationale: Tufted pile attracts dust and lint; high affinity.

moisture_humidity_behavior.rationale: Pile retains humidity; drying slow depending on fiber blend.

indoor_air_voc.rationale: Low-emitting fiber; backing/dye chemistry governs actual VOC.

abrasion_wear.standard_ref: ISO 12947 Martindale / ASTM D4157 Wyzenbeek (ACT bands)
abrasion_wear.rationale: Full-grain hide is dense and tough; commercial-grade abrasion typical when properly tanned.

dent_hardness.rationale: Resists abrasion but takes scratches/scuffs that patina; no rigid indentation metric.

cleanability.standard_ref: ACT cleaning code (leather treated as wipe-clean S/WS)
cleanability.rationale: Sealed full-grain wipes clean; avoid soaking — moisture penetrates unfinished grain.

dust_static_affinity.rationale: Smooth non-pile surface sheds dust; low static.

moisture_humidity_behavior.rationale: Natural hide can dry/crack in low humidity and mould in high humidity if unsealed; conditioning required.

indoor_air_voc.rationale: Tanning agents/finishes vary (chrome vs veg-tan); VOC depends on finish, certify to confirm.

abrasion_wear.standard_ref: ISO 12947 Martindale / ASTM D4157 Wyzenbeek (ACT bands)
abrasion_wear.rationale: Polyurethane-coated fabric; coating cracks/peels with wear — lower lifespan than genuine hide.

dent_hardness.rationale: Thin coating over fabric; no rigid indentation metric, prone to surface delamination.

cleanability.standard_ref: ACT cleaning code (PU treated as wipe-clean W/WS)
cleanability.rationale: Non-porous coating wipes clean easily; top maintenance trait of this material.

dust_static_affinity.rationale: Smooth sealed surface sheds dust; low affinity.

moisture_humidity_behavior.rationale: Coating is water-resistant and inert to humidity; backing fabric can hold moisture if breached.

indoor_air_voc.rationale: Polyurethane coatings/plasticizers can off-gas; certify to confirm low emission.

abrasion_wear.standard_ref: n/a (natural-fiber abrasion proxy; no textile/tile rating applies)
abrasion_wear.rationale: Woven plant fiber; durable in tension but strands fray and snap under point abrasion.

dent_hardness.rationale: Hollow canes dent and crack under load; low indentation resistance.

cleanability.rationale: Weave crevices trap dust and resist wiping; needs brushing/vacuuming.

dust_static_affinity.rationale: Open weave crevices trap dust heavily; high affinity.

moisture_humidity_behavior.rationale: India-critical: natural plant fiber swells, sags and moulds in high humidity unless sealed; brittle in dry heat.

indoor_air_voc.rationale: Bare natural material off-gasses little; only added lacquers/adhesives would raise VOC.

abrasion_wear.standard_ref: Janka ASTM D1037 (~1070 lbf)
abrasion_wear.rationale: Dense oily hardwood resists surface wear well; Janka ~1070 lbf.

dent_hardness.rationale: Published Janka hardness for teak is ~1070 lbf — a real species-level standard value.

cleanability.rationale: Sealed teak wipes clean; raw/oiled grain absorbs spills and stains.

dust_static_affinity.rationale: Smooth finished surface sheds dust; low static.

moisture_humidity_behavior.rationale: Natural oils make teak unusually dimensionally stable in humidity vs other solid woods; still moves seasonally.

indoor_air_voc.rationale: Solid wood has no added formaldehyde binders; VOC comes only from any applied finish.

abrasion_wear.standard_ref: Janka ASTM D1037 (~1780 lbf)
abrasion_wear.rationale: Very dense rosewood (sheesham); high surface-wear resistance, Janka ~1780 lbf.

dent_hardness.rationale: Published Janka hardness for sheesham (Indian rosewood) is ~1780 lbf — a real species-level value.

cleanability.rationale: Sealed surface wipes clean; open grain absorbs spills.

dust_static_affinity.rationale: Smooth finished surface sheds dust; low static.

moisture_humidity_behavior.rationale: India-critical: dense hardwood moves and can warp/check with humidity swings unless sealed and acclimatized.

indoor_air_voc.rationale: No added formaldehyde binders; VOC limited to applied finish.

abrasion_wear.standard_ref: Janka ASTM D1037 (~960 lbf)
abrasion_wear.rationale: Mid-density hardwood; moderate surface-wear resistance, Janka ~960 lbf.

dent_hardness.rationale: Published Janka hardness for rubberwood is ~960 lbf — a real species-level value.

cleanability.rationale: Sealed surface wipes clean; raw grain stains.

dust_static_affinity.rationale: Smooth finished surface sheds dust; low static.

moisture_humidity_behavior.rationale: India-critical: rubberwood is prone to swelling, fungal stain and borer in high humidity unless kiln-dried and treated.

indoor_air_voc.standard_ref: n/a (solid wood, but commonly finger-jointed with adhesives)
indoor_air_voc.rationale: Solid wood itself is low-emitting, but rubberwood is often finger-jointed/glued — joint adhesive can add formaldehyde.

abrasion_wear.standard_ref: Janka ASTM D1037 (veneer over core)
abrasion_wear.rationale: Wear governed by the thin veneer/wear layer over a stable engineered core; moderate.

dent_hardness.standard_ref: n/a (depends on veneer species over core)
dent_hardness.rationale: Core is stable but veneer is thin; dent resistance limited by surface layer.

cleanability.rationale: Factory-sealed surface wipes clean; edges/joints can wick moisture.

dust_static_affinity.rationale: Smooth finished surface sheds dust; low static.

moisture_humidity_behavior.rationale: Cross-laminated/plywood core is more stable than solid wood, but exposed edges swell if moisture reaches the core.

indoor_air_voc.standard_ref: Formaldehyde class E1/E0 / CARB Phase 2; GREENGUARD UL 2818
indoor_air_voc.rationale: Glue-bonded core can off-gas formaldehyde; specify E0/CARB Phase 2 / GREENGUARD to control emission.

abrasion_wear.standard_ref: Janka ASTM D1037 (low for fiberboard) / AC rating if laminated
abrasion_wear.rationale: Bare MDF is soft and wears quickly; durability depends entirely on any laminate/coating applied.

dent_hardness.rationale: Compressed fiber dents and crushes under point load; low hardness.

cleanability.rationale: Coated/laminated MDF wipes clean; raw or cut edges absorb water and swell irreversibly.

dust_static_affinity.rationale: Smooth coated surface sheds dust; raw edges shed fiber dust.

moisture_humidity_behavior.rationale: India-critical: MDF swells and disintegrates with moisture/high humidity unless fully sealed; worst-in-class for damp climates.

indoor_air_voc.standard_ref: Formaldehyde class E1/E0 / CARB Phase 2; GREENGUARD UL 2818
indoor_air_voc.rationale: Urea-formaldehyde-bonded fiber is a primary indoor formaldehyde source; require CARB Phase 2 / E0 / GREENGUARD.

abrasion_wear.standard_ref: Janka ASTM D1037 (very low for particleboard) / AC rating if laminated
abrasion_wear.rationale: Bonded wood chips are weak; surface durability comes only from any melamine/laminate facing.

dent_hardness.rationale: Loose chip structure crushes easily; lowest hardness of the panel materials.

cleanability.rationale: Melamine-faced board wipes clean; exposed chip edges absorb water and crumble.

dust_static_affinity.rationale: Faced surface sheds dust; raw edges shed chip dust.

moisture_humidity_behavior.rationale: India-critical: particleboard swells and crumbles with moisture/high humidity; unsuitable for damp areas unsealed.

indoor_air_voc.standard_ref: Formaldehyde class E1/E0 / CARB Phase 2; GREENGUARD UL 2818
indoor_air_voc.rationale: High urea-formaldehyde binder content; among the largest indoor formaldehyde sources — require CARB Phase 2 / E0.

abrasion_wear.standard_ref: n/a (vitreous surface; PEI/Martindale not applicable)
abrasion_wear.rationale: Hard vitreous surface resists scratching/abrasion; near top-of-class (can chip on impact).

dent_hardness.rationale: Effectively non-indentable; brittle failure is by fracture, not denting.

cleanability.rationale: Non-porous smooth surface wipes fully clean; top maintenance trait.

dust_static_affinity.rationale: Smooth sealed surface; dust sits loosely and wipes off, low static. Lowest affinity class.

moisture_humidity_behavior.rationale: Completely inert to moisture and humidity; no swelling or mould.

indoor_air_voc.rationale: Inorganic and inert; emits no VOC.

abrasion_wear.standard_ref: EN 13329 AC rating (AC1-AC6)
abrasion_wear.rationale: High-pressure laminate wear layer resists abrasion well; AC band depends on grade (commonly AC3-AC5).

dent_hardness.rationale: Hard wear layer resists surface marring; dent resistance limited by the substrate beneath.

cleanability.rationale: Non-porous laminate wipes clean easily; top maintenance trait.

dust_static_affinity.rationale: Smooth sealed surface sheds dust; low static.

moisture_humidity_behavior.rationale: Laminate face is inert to humidity; only exposed substrate edges/seams are vulnerable to moisture.

indoor_air_voc.rationale: Laminate itself is low-emitting; emissions driven by the bonding adhesive and the panel substrate — certify.

abrasion_wear.standard_ref: ISO 10545-7 PEI (rated I-V)
abrasion_wear.rationale: Glazed porcelain abrasion is rated on the published PEI scale (ISO 10545-7); commercial grades reach PEI IV-V.

dent_hardness.rationale: Vitrified body is extremely hard; effectively non-indentable, fails by chipping on impact.

cleanability.rationale: Glazed non-porous face wipes clean; grout joints are the only soil trap.

dust_static_affinity.rationale: Smooth glazed surface sheds dust; low static.

moisture_humidity_behavior.rationale: Vitrified low-absorption body is effectively inert to moisture and humidity.

indoor_air_voc.rationale: Fired inorganic material emits no VOC.

abrasion_wear.standard_ref: ASTM C241 / C501 abrasion resistance (Ha index)
abrasion_wear.rationale: Calcite stone; harder than wood but softer than porcelain and prone to surface dulling from traffic.

dent_hardness.rationale: Rigid and hard, resists indentation; can chip on sharp impact.

cleanability.rationale: Porous and acid-sensitive; etches and stains from spills unless sealed — wiping is not enough.

dust_static_affinity.rationale: Polished surface sheds dust; honed/unsealed surface holds more.

moisture_humidity_behavior.rationale: Calcite is porous; absorbs moisture and can harbor staining/efflorescence unless sealed, but does not swell.

indoor_air_voc.rationale: Inert natural mineral emits no VOC; only an applied sealer would contribute.

abrasion_wear.standard_ref: ASTM D4060 Taber abrasion (coating)
abrasion_wear.rationale: Cured powder coat is a tough abrasion-resistant film over steel; chips at edges under hard impact.

dent_hardness.rationale: Steel resists indentation strongly; thin-gauge sections can dent on heavy impact.

cleanability.rationale: Non-porous coated surface wipes clean easily; top maintenance trait.

dust_static_affinity.rationale: Smooth sealed surface sheds dust; grounded metal does not hold static.

moisture_humidity_behavior.standard_ref: ASTM B117 salt-spray (corrosion of coated steel)
moisture_humidity_behavior.rationale: Intact powder coat protects steel from humidity; corrosion risk only where the coating is breached.

indoor_air_voc.rationale: Powder coating is applied solvent-free and fully cured; negligible VOC.

abrasion_wear.standard_ref: ASTM D4060 Taber abrasion (plastics)
abrasion_wear.rationale: Tough thermoplastic with moderate abrasion resistance; scratches but resists cracking.

dent_hardness.rationale: Semi-rigid plastic; flexes and recovers rather than denting permanently.

cleanability.rationale: Non-porous moulded surface wipes clean easily; top maintenance trait.

dust_static_affinity.rationale: Insulating plastic readily holds static charge and attracts dust despite smooth surface.

moisture_humidity_behavior.rationale: Hydrophobic and inert to moisture/humidity; no swelling or mould.

indoor_air_voc.rationale: Polypropylene is low-emitting; residual additives/colorants can off-gas slightly — certify to confirm.

abrasion_wear.standard_ref: ISO 12947 Martindale / ASTM D4157 Wyzenbeek (ACT bands)
abrasion_wear.rationale: Synthetic woven fabric; many polyester upholstery weaves reach the ~30k double-rub commercial band.

dent_hardness.rationale: Flexible textile; no rigid indentation metric applies.

cleanability.rationale: Often W or WS cleanable; flat weaves clean more readily than pile.

dust_static_affinity.rationale: Synthetic fiber holds static and attracts dust/lint; high affinity.

moisture_humidity_behavior.rationale: Hydrophobic fiber dries fast and resists mould better than natural fibers; backing/foam can still hold moisture.

indoor_air_voc.rationale: Low-emitting fiber; dyes, finishes and backing adhesives govern actual VOC — certify.

abrasion_wear.standard_ref: n/a (natural-fiber abrasion proxy; no textile rating applies)
abrasion_wear.rationale: Coarse bast fiber; sheds and frays under traffic, low abrasion lifespan.

dent_hardness.rationale: Soft fibrous surface; crushes under load, no rigid indentation metric.

cleanability.rationale: Highly absorbent and water-sensitive; stains readily and cannot be wet-cleaned — spot-clean only.

dust_static_affinity.rationale: Coarse open weave traps dust and sheds fiber; moderate-to-high affinity, low static.

moisture_humidity_behavior.rationale: India-critical: highly hygroscopic plant fiber; absorbs humidity, smells and moulds quickly in damp conditions.

indoor_air_voc.rationale: Bare natural fiber off-gasses little; only backing latex/adhesive would raise VOC.
